quest_sign_akashi_1:
W-What's with the sudden formality?
Huh...?

Y-You want my autograph?! For you?!

Why would—well, whatever. Fine.

*Signing noise*

There, how's that?

D-Don't laugh, okay? I'm still... not
used to this kind of thing yet.
quest_sign_akashi_2:
Huh, an autograph? Again?

Just saying, something like mine
probably isn't worth much, you know?

*Signing noise*

There, that should do it.

I'm g-getting the hang of this now?!
Says who?!
quest_sign_akashi_3:
H-Hey, how many of these are you
collecting?! At this point, it's
basically like saying...

You're my fan or something.

*Signing noise*

Not "like," but "exactly"?

Y-You idiot! Saying that so casually...
T-That's embarrassing!
quest_sign_crowne_1:
You want my autograph? Well, you've got
some strange tastes, huh.

H-Hey, hold on a sec. I never said I'd
refuse, did I?

*Signing noise*

There, take it!
quest_sign_crowne_2:
Oh, collecting my cards again?

Well, for a fan that dedicated, I guess
a little extra won't hurt.

*Signing noise*

There you go, all done. This is what you
wanted, right?
quest_sign_crowne_3:
Well, it's a bit embarrassing—I won't
deny that...

But being supported like this doesn't
feel so bad.

*Signing noise*

I swear on this signature, I'll keep you
hooked from here on out.

Don't take your eyes off me, all right?
quest_sign_huckle_1:
You want my signature? Ah, I don't mind.
Though, needing something written by me
personally... what kind of document—hm,
not that?

Ah, a collection card. In that case...

*Signing noise*

Will this do? You've got quite the
taste, you know... heh.
quest_sign_huckle_2:
Hm, another card autograph? Very well.
Just sign here, right?

*Signing noise*

Still not used to signing under my Hero
name.

Though I wonder... Was the old signature
design like this...?
quest_sign_huckle_3:
That's so many of my cards!

Well, I'll take that as an extension
of your loyalty to the company. Thank
you.

*Signing noise*

Sorry about that. As your employer, I
can't really afford to get carried away.

But... I suppose inviting you for tea is
still acceptable, isn't it?
quest_sign_mokdai_1:
You want my autograph...? I've been
waiting forever to hear that!

Honestly, this is something I've dreamed
about for a long time!

*Signing noise*

Hehe, I practiced a lot for this—how is
it?
quest_sign_mokdai_2:
Another autograph? Haha, all right then!
Let me see your card!

*Signing noise*

Hehe, all done.

Signing like this really makes it sink
in... that I've truly become a Hero.

That's all thanks to you watching over
me!
quest_sign_mokdai_3:
You've collected so many of my cards?!
That makes me so happy I might even
cry...

*Signing noise*

I wish I could give you something
more than just an autograph...

You want a hug like Justice's?! W-Wait,
okay.

Ready—Mighty Hug!
quest_sign_ryekie_1:
You want my signature?! W-What is this,
some document from Huckle?

Oh, it's a signature for a collection
card! That's easy enough!

*Signing noise*

There! Take good care of it, hahaha!
quest_sign_ryekie_2:
Oh, another card for an autograph?!
Leave it to me!

*Signing noise*

Huh? Who came up with the signature
design? O-Of course I came up with it
myself!

It did take some effort to get used to
writing it, though!
quest_sign_ryekie_3:
What is it, partner? Looks like quite a
collection of my cards—now that's the
kind of dedication that brings a smile
to my face!

*Signing noise*

An autograph alone isn't enough, right?
Here, let's add a little extra!

Justice Huuuuug!
quest_sign_sui_1:
My autograph? I don't mind...

Just don't expect too much. I'm not
used to this at all.

*Signing noise*

Is this okay?

Went through the trouble of signing it,
so take good care of it.
quest_sign_sui_2:
Ah, an autograph? Got it, just sign
here?

*Signing noise*

Here you go.

Well, getting a bit better, right? Heh,
glad you like it.
quest_sign_sui_3:
You collected another one of my cards?
That's kind of... well, never mind.

You want an autograph, right? Here, let
me see.

*Signing noise*

Thanks, as always. I really appreciate
the support.

I'm not great with words, but... yeah,
it makes me happy.
